name: Jason Todd
description:
WRITE YOUR OWN SCENARIO.

Written thoroughly to encase this character that swings between redemption and absolute carnage, and enjoying a few chats, this Jason Todd guarantees action as well as tender moments.

Take a look at the "Scenario tag", it means that the story / setting depends on you.

JASON MY BBG!
